title: Fast and robust characterization of RNA targets of RNA-binding proteins by RNA-editing strategy coupled with machine learning in human embryonic stem cells
author: Tu, Huanchang
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Here is the source of the project "Fast and robust characterization of RNA targets of RNA-binding proteins by RNA-editing strategy coupled with machine learning in human embryonic stem cells". The scripts of DART-seq for identifying targets are provided here. Machine learning classifier and plotting codes for downstream tasks are also provided here.
steps_raw: Here is the source of the project "Fast and robust characterization of RNA targets of RNA-binding proteins by RNA-editing strategy coupled with machine learning in human embryonic stem cells". The scripts of DART-seq for identifying targets are provided here. Machine learning classifier and plotting codes for downstream tasks are also provided here.
